item.title: Kitchen & Dining: Best New Deals to Buy in UK - Top Picks
item.description: Discover kitchen & dining finds on eBay UK — vintage cutlery to a Mr Potato Head mug, £7–£140, with buying tips and care advice. Buy now today. Get it now.

item.title: Best Kitchen & Dining: Vintage Solid Bronze Cutlery
item.description: Buy vintage solid bronze tableware cutlery, brand new in box, £139.99 UK listing. Click to discover this rare, stylish set. Buy now. Shop now for UK buyers.
